title: pelargonium × flaccidum
intro: Pelargonium × flaccidum, also known as Rose Geranium or Sweet-scented Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, characterized by its fragrant pink or white flowers and leathery, rounded leaves. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Pelargonium × flaccidum include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and aiding in the treatment of menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, essential oils, or tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
